response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web and full-stack experience, but the role demands current, hands-on C++/STL expertise in industrial automation contexts. His C++ exposure is minimal and dated (a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project), and there is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers in C++, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial protocol experience. His high-performance systems work was in DLang, which is adjacent but not a substitute for the core requirement.
strengths: Extensive overall engineering experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, event-driven design) at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: C++/STL experience is minimal and roughly a decade old; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No demonstrated IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial-cybersecurity experience
No MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or other industrial protocol exposure; no IoT/automation domain background
